m1_l2_only.sql: SELECT `file_id`, `id` FROM `{table}` ORDER BY l2_distance(`{emb_col}`, %s) ASC LIMIT %s

m2_l2_filter.sql: SELECT `file_id`, `id`, l2_distance(`{emb_col}`, %s) AS dist FROM `{table}` WHERE `{filter_col}` = %s ORDER BY dist ASC LIMIT %s

m3_l2_filter_threshold.sql: SELECT `file_id`, `id`, l2_distance(`{emb_col}`, %s) AS dist FROM `{table}` WHERE `{filter_col}` = %s AND l2_distance(`{emb_col}`, %s) <= {max_distance} ORDER BY dist ASC LIMIT %s
